blended.narrative: Arapahoe Basin is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 7,843 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.6" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 35".
